Make sure not to include anything else.

Thus final answer: three lines.

Thus final: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs.

We'll produce exactly that.

blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
